items.title: MathWorks tutorial
items.note: this is imp? do it 8-9 am

1. If there was a  button like a 'plus' to add resources rather the whole placeholders being displayed, display only after hitting plus button.
                                                                                                      
2. When deleting resources or maybe folder too, prompt the user to be sure about their decision. - Prevents accidental deletion

3. Moving rename and delete folder options in the dashboard with the folder names themselves. so one doesnt have to open it to do the action.

4. Found a bug that while u are editing a resource for eg: typing notes and u havent saved it but go back to dashboardd and click other resource the 'note'/resource  gets displayed there as well, altho its not originally written there-- only when u havent saved it

 5. In note section when user enters 'enter' , add another line to actual text as well?

6.
